combined_text: Federal Court Rules: Cheerleading Not a Sport "Us Federal Court Rules: Cheerleading Not a Sport Published July 21, 2010 Associated Press Facebook Twitter livefyre Email A sport? Not so, says one federal judge. (AP Photo)HARTFORD, Conn. -- Competitive cheerleading is not an official sport that colleges can use to meet gender-equity requirements,
